Jst and 7th houses and benefics in 4th and 10th. Effects : He
will be engaged in observing vows and performing religious
rites, charitable, wealthy, but happy and moneyed only in the
middle portion of his life. Kama!a : All the planets should be
posited in the four Kendras in any manner. Effects : The

YOGAS 147
person will be very famous, virtuous, long-lived, handsome and
wielding power. VapZ ; All the planets should occupy the four
Panaphara (succedent) or the four Apoklima (cadent) houses.
Effects : He will hoard his money, be miserly, and have some
unenduring happiness. Yupa : All the planets should occupy
the 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th houses. Effects : He will be chari-
table, wealthy, happy, illustrious, truthful and observing vows.
IfU or Sara : All the planets should be posited in the 4th, 5th,
6th and 7th houses. Effects : He will be engaged in manufac-
turing aiTows, imprisoning thieves, hunting and wandering in
forests. He will also be cruel and a bad artisan.
